author: y4rr
content: Result: Cifar10::from_dir and Cifar100::from_dir implemented in ferrotorch-vision/src/datasets/cifar.rs. Synthetic fixture files created in tests/conformance/fixtures/datasets_synthetic/ (8 files, all <13KB): MNIST IDX files (train/test, 4x4 images) + CIFAR-10 batch files + CIFAR-100 batch files. conformance_vision_datasets.rs: 25 tests all passing covering shape, dtype, label parsing, pixel normalization, error cases, and f32/f64.
